scripts.lint:format:check: prettier --check --ignore-path .prettierignore "{server/src,server/tests,client/src,e2e}/**/*.{ts,tsx}" client/vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts vitest.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json package.json .github/workflows/ci.yml
scripts.lint:format: prettier --write --ignore-path .prettierignore "{server/src,server/tests,client/src,e2e}/**/*.{ts,tsx}" client/vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts vitest.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json package.json .github/workflows/ci.yml
scripts.lint: npm run lint:format:check && npm run lint:code
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run test:e2e
